title: Big Tech Is Buying Up Open Source... Vite Is Next
summary: Cloudflare acquired VoidZero, the company behind developer tools Vite, Vitest, Rolldown, and Oxc. The video discusses this as part of a broader trend of big tech companies acquiring open source developer tooling, and explores concerns about consolidation alongside potential benefits.
writeup: Better Stack covers Cloudflare's acquisition of VoidZero, the company behind Vite, Vitest, Rolldown, and Oxc. The video frames this purchase as part of a broader pattern of large technology companies buying open source developer tooling. It weighs concerns about consolidation against the potential benefits of corporate backing for these projects.
